title: Parliament budget session LIVE: ‘Every effort being made to help stranded Indians', says Jaishankar in Rajya Sabha
description: Parliament budget session LIVE updates: EAM Jaishankar said in Rajya Sabha that all efforts are being made to help Indians stranded across West Asia. He said that India remains in favour of peace, return to dialogue & diplomacy; advocate de-escalation, restraint, and ensuring safety of civilians.
